title: HexCircus
description: Adding a bit of showmanship to Hexcasting!
body:
Welcome! Ladies, Gentlemen, and everything in-between to HexCircus, the hex addon focused on showmanship, spectacle, and pizzazz!

Whether you are looking for more options with particles, or even turning mobs into your personal crew, we’ve got it all!

## Features
- Summon individual particles to follow either a linear or bezier path!
- Particles have RGB and speed input for easy manipulation!
- Override the pathfinding of mobs to make them part of your show!
- Summon programmable particles with custom behavior! (Planned)
